message:
feat(tests): add 42 property tests for doctor, permissions, and autocomplete

doctor (13): severity ordering/display/serde, CheckCategory from_str aliases
and case insensitivity, unknown rejection, label non-empty, from_findings
count/severity aggregation, config key pairs, finding builder chain, fixed().

permissions (11): days_to_ymd valid ranges/epoch/consecutive/year-boundary/
leap-day-2000, now_iso8601 format, PersistedDecision serde roundtrip,
record-lookup-overwrite-revoke invariants, unknown lookup.

autocomplete (18): clamp_usize_to_i32 saturation, clamp_to_char_boundary/
clamp_cursor UTF-8 safety, fuzzy_match_score empty/prefix/case-insensitive,
is_path_like prefixes/words/empty, split_path_prefix reconstruct/tilde/
trailing-slash/no-slash, token_at_cursor bounds/no-whitespace, kind_rank
distinct, resolve_dir_path absolute/relative.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
